raw_consumer_statement:
I received a fraud alert on or about the evening XX/XX/XXXX from AT & T Universal, Citibank. I called on the morning on XX/XX/XXXX, and disputed the charges and directed the card bearing last 4 digits ( XXXX ) be cancelled. After the card was purported to be cancelled, credit card company continued to report fraudulent transactions and I continued to contact them and dispute the charges. Nevertheless, when I received my XX/XX/XXXX statement, 4 disputed charged that were processed on XX/XX/XXXX appeared on my statement. Those 4 charges were made 1 day AFTER the card was cancelled. 

AT & T Universal, Citibank, issued me a new card ending in XXXX. I did not activate the card. Nevertheless, AT & T Universal, contacted me about charges being made on the old card ( XXXX ) and the inactive new card ( XXXX ). 

After numerous attempts to resolve matters, I cancelled my AT & T Universal account ; having been a member since XXXX.
